purpose: Text-derived pseudo-GT target aliases for motion-pattern audits. This file is used only for evaluation and naming diagnostics, not for Motion-BPE merge learning or runtime AML rules.

targets.notes: Smoke-test target for evaluating whether learned coordination motifs recover a compact named exercise pattern.
